2026-04-08T17:38:01.9229682Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-08T17:38:01.9233606Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-08T17:38:01.9234864Z 
2026-04-08T17:38:01.9235381Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-08T17:38:01.9239364Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T17:38:01.9240016Z 
2026-04-08T17:38:01.9240294Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T17:38:01.9240741Z

2026-04-08T17:38:01.9241375Z
